sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: simple traditional fat because this gives butter a cleaner identity than heavily processed fat substitutes. very strong culinary usefulness because butter has real kitchen legitimacy and practical use that matters in this category. can fit as a moderate traditional fat because the editorial position here is that butter belongs as a flawed but legitimate middle-ground fat rather than a bottom-tier industrial product.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: saturated fat is a major drawback because this is the main reason butter cannot be an elite oils-and-fats food. cholesterol is high because a second meaningful strike against the fat profile. fat profile is clearly weaker than top-tier oils because butter is not competing with the best oils on chemistry alone.
